specific_mechanism: Multi-axis composite encoding per cord (knot-type + position + color + spin + fiber) within a hierarchical tree of cords.
llm_application: QUIPU-TOK: composite token embedding combining 5 orthogonal categorical channels (word-piece, color/category, spin/polarity, fiber/source, parent-cord attachment) summed plus hierarchical structure; aimed at richer side-tag injection for general LLM tokens.
novelty_claim: Tabular embeddings (2502.11596) cover categorical+numerical; structured dependency encoding (2501.18205) covers dependency; hybrid tabular tokenization (2508.01685) covers structure. QUIPU-TOK proposes a 5-channel composite with hierarchy-attachment for general text — open question whether already covered by side-info / multi-channel embedding work.
